name: ccb-post-loan
description: CCB post-loan portal query toolkit for Codex, WorkBuddy, and Doubao Office Tasks.

scripts.check:js: node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/capture_template_slots.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/capture_portals.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/repair_required_evidence.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/search_manager.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/data_source_registry.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/auth_handlers.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/subject_graph.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/investigation_mode.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/challenge_engine.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/enforcement_source.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/evidence_contract.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/authorized_judicial_provider.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/judicial_diagnostics.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/judicial_routes.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/judicial_run_scheduler.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/retry_plan.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/challenge_policy.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/challenge_detector.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/source_state_store.js && node --check packages/core-skill/scripts/framework/audit.js && node --check tools/confirm-deep-investigation.js && node --check tools/set-investigation-mode.js && node --check tools/first-run.js && node --check tools/test-challenge-policy.js && node --check tools/test-challenge-detector.js && node --check tools/test-evidence-contract.js && node --check tools/test-judicial-diagnostics.js && node --check tools/test-retry-plan.js && node --check tools/test-investigation-mode.js
scripts.check:bash: bash -n packages/doubao/run_doubao_app.sh && bash -n packages/doubao/preflight_doubao_app.sh && bash -n packages/core-skill/workbuddy/run_workbuddy.sh && bash -n codex-plugin/skills/post-loan-portal-check/workbuddy/run_workbuddy.sh
scripts.acceptance:live: npm run acceptance:live:platforms && npm run acceptance:live:search && npm run acceptance:live:batch && npm run acceptance:live:monitor
scripts.test: npm run check:js && npm run test:datasource && npm run test:graph && npm run test:policy && npm run test:challenge-detector && npm run test:evidence && npm run test:judicial && npm run test:judicial-diagnostics && npm run test:retry-plan && npm run test:investigation-mode && npm run test:platform-contracts && npm run test:report
